text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm relaxing in my room on a day off.<n>I'm about to
eat breakfast, when...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
choice_data_list: (I've got a bad feeling about this!)

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much for everything!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You've taught me so much since we<n>first met!
Like... um... so many new<n>things!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to you, my divinations are<n>now a thousand
percent accurate!<n>And my running has only gotten
better too!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The goddess of victory isn't just on<n>my side,
she's this close to being my<n>best friend too!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It's all thanks to you and the great<n>Shiraoki! I give
thanks! Oh, how<n>grateful I am!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Now, I bid you adieu! I have<n>expressed my
innermost feelings,<n>compelled to do so as I was in
my<n>dreams. Time to go home!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I don't quite grasp what she's<n>saying... but I think
she's satisfied<n>with my guidance so far!
